chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-282 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.3545/2022 22.03.2022 Syed Shahzad Ali Shah, advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh *** Urgency is granted. This petition is pending since 09.02.2022 and notices were ordered on 17.02.2022. Despite office objection regarding maintainability of this petition, the notices were repeated on 03.03.2022; however, till date no comments have been filed. We have asked the learned Additional A.G Sindh, if any assistance could be provided since the application is pending for quite some time before the Deputy Commissioner. He has very graciously considered the application and has undertaken that the Deputy Commissioner shall decide the application at the earliest so that the grievance of the petitioner shall be redressed. It is expected that the application, which is claimed to be pending before the Deputy Commissioner since 28.12.2021, shall be decided by the Deputy Commissioner in accordance with law at the earliest. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
